column3: AMI Corpus is a meeting summarization dataset containing dialogues and their corresponding human-written summaries. It is primarily used for text summarization tasks and includes discussions that may implicitly reflect requirements and design decisions.

MetaAgent Creator is an XML-based system prompt framework designed to support AI agent design through requirement extraction, prompt engineering, and adaptive reasoning. It is not a traditional dataset but a structured prompt specification.

Quantum Agent Genesis is a prompt-based XML framework for designing and optimizing multi-agent systems using quantum-inspired principles and self-organization. It supports requirement analysis and system design but is not a traditional dataset.
A structured instruction dataset for website generation where natural language inputs encode functional and UI requirements, enabling LLMs to generate and iteratively refine web applications.
A small tabular dataset containing natural language software task descriptions across multiple programming domains, which implicitly represent functional requirements used for code generation.
A dataset of automotive system requirements with associated metadata for analysis, validation, and safety assessment.
